How many people are on the team?
Hi Danilo! I have a quick question about the new project. Who is on the team?
Good question! There are five people. I am the lead, and you are the product manager.
Nice. What does the project do? Can you give me more details?
Sure. It builds a data platform. It collects information from many systems.
That is a clear answer. What is the meaning of platform?
It is one place for all our data. For example, reports, numbers, and charts.
I see. And when do we start? Why is it urgent?
We start on Monday. The reason is simple: the client needs it in March.
Got it. I write the reports, and I collect feedback from the users.
Perfect. Thanks for all the questions, Rachel!
I have a quick question. What do you do?
Where do you work, and who is your manager?
When did the project start?
Can you give me more details? For example?
That is a good answer. Thanks for the feedback.

Hi everyone, thanks for your questions about the new project. Let me give you the details. First, who is on the team? The project has five people. I am the lead, and Rachel is the product manager. Second, what does the project do? It builds a new data platform for the company. It collects information from many systems and puts it in one place. Third, when does it start? We start next Monday, and the first version is ready in three months. And why is this project important? Because right now our data is slow and hard to find. The new platform gives everyone fast, clear answers. If you have more questions, just send me an email. Thanks for listening!
